title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at RBL Bank

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at RBL Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with RBL Bank! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Noida team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About RBL Bank:
RBL Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RBL Bank!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
